constraint.name: ca_produccion_ordenesnumseries_ordenes
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idorden) REFERENCES produccion_ordenes (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_produccion_ordenesnumseries_ordenes2
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idusedinorder) REFERENCES produccion_ordenes (id) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_produccion_ordenesnumseries_productos
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idline) REFERENCES produccion_ordenesproductos (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_produccion_ordenesnumseries_users
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (verifynick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_produccion_ordenesnumseries_albaranescli
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (iddelivery) REFERENCES albaranescli (idalbaran) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
